directives.message: Thorough scan requires 3 analysis passes — you have completed 0. Start pass 1 now. Focus on chained vulnerabilities and second-order sinks. Run scan(tool='semgrep') with a new ruleset angle.
directives.ack_message: I acknowledge the missing credential-audit alert and will invoke credential-audit after the spider gate is cleared. I acknowledge the whitebox pass reminder; this is a black-box localhost target without a configured codebase, so I will focus current thorough passes on live web/API testing unless source becomes available.
